name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Dog Urinary Chicken & Egg & Rice 12kg
shortDescription: Formulated to prevent the formation and recurrence of urinary tract stones that develop in the urinary tract in dogs. It promotes the health of the urinary tract by creating an optimal pH level in the urinary tract using natural acidifiers. It contains a low level of magnesium and phosphorous which are a precursor to formation of urinary stones.
description: How it works: - Preventing the formation of urinary tract stones with optimal urine PH (6.4-6.6) , -Urine acidifying properties and low magnesium level (0.04%), - Quality and hydrolyzed protein sources, - Composition containing organic trace elements, - Dried algae (Omega-3 and vitamin source), - Cranberry (Optimum kidney health) Ingredients:? Dehydrated Egg, Brown Rice, Chicken Protein, Pea, Sugar Beet Pulp, Corn Gluten Meal, Chicken Oil, Fish Oil, Hydrolyzed Chicken Liver, Sodium Chlorite, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Dried Algae, Calcium Sulphate, Cranberry, MOS,-Glucan, Tocopherol, Yucca, Wild Sea buckthorn. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
